creator: theis@gmx.at
text:
Am 13.05.2014 19:40, schrieb Edwin Groothuis:
> Maintainer of security/py-fail2ban,
>
> Please note that PR ports/189781 has just been submitted.
>
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
>
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>      http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/189781

 From my side OK. And thank you for creating the patch.

There is one patch from me pending, where I try to correctly create the 
/var/run/fail2ban directory.


Christoph
